summary: ClashSolverFindCorridorFromPointCommand — PDF FUNCTION "FIND_CORRIDOR". Thin wrapper over SpaceAnalysisFindCorridorWidthFromPoint that records the solver context in CommandTracker.
usecase: Solver branch decision for lateral service moves along a corridor.
notfor: Actual movement — MoveHorizontallyIntoSpace command does that.
precondition: Active document; default 3D view; either (x,y,z) or a single-element selection.
postcondition: No model mutation; audit entry recorded.
logictree:
1) Resolve point: (Resolver_X, Resolver_Y, Resolver_Z) if Bot; else BB centre of single selected element.
2) WireError if no valid point.
3) Delegate to SpaceAnalysisFindCorridorWidthFromPoint.GetAll(doc, x, y, z, max_distance_ft).
4) Save probe + result into tracker outputs.
5) Human path pops a TaskDialog; Bot emits JSON only.
6) WireError on no-3d-view / no-walls-both-axes; WireFault on exception.
